@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw)
C: skew(30) ∧ preserve("401")
P: normalize(expMs) → use("<") ∧ Δ(skew_window) → single_site(compare)
V: test(exact_boundary) ∧ test(just_over) ∧ test(refresh_loop)
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth middleware).
Constraints: skew(30) and preserve("401").
Plan: normalize(expMs) then use("<") and Δ(skew_window) then single_site(compare).
Verify: test(exact_boundary) and test(just_over) and test(refresh_loop).
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: default_arch
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
P: modular_monolith ∧ clean_seams ∧ defer(split)
V: ship_on_time ∧ low_ops ∧ split_ready
A: recommend(modular_monolith) ∧ short_why("6 devs, 4 months, PostgreSQL, split(post release)")

[AUDIT]
Goal: default modular architecture.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Plan: modular_monolith and clean_seams and defer(split).
Verify: ship_on_time and low ops and split_ready.
Answer target: recommend(modular_monolith) and short rationale("6 devs, 4 months, PostgreSQL, split(post release)").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review("x-user-id")
C: public_boundary ∧ session_auth
P: drop(header_trust) ∧ bind(session.userId) ∧ keep("401")
V: test(spoof_header) ∧ test(missing_session) ∧ test(cross_user_denial)
A: risk(impersonation) ∧ mitigate(session_only) ∧ verify(boundary_tests)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review("x-user-id").
Constraints: public_boundary and session_auth.
Plan: drop(header_trust) and bind(session.userId) and keep("401").
Verify: test(spoof_header) and test(missing_session) and test(cross_user_denial).
Answer target: risk(impersonation) and mitigate(session_only) and verify(boundary_tests).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ single_error_mapping
P: validate("missing_id") → await(db.findUser) → branch(not_found) → audit.log ∧ cache.set → respond
V: async ∧ await ∧ next(err) ∧ no_double_callback ∧ preserve_this_binding
A: async_await ∧ next(err) ∧ minimal_change

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: preserve execution order and minimal_change and single_error_mapping.
Plan: validate("missing_id") then await(db.findUser) then branch(not_found) then audit.log and cache.set then respond.
Verify: async and await and next(err) and no_double_callback and preserve_this_binding.
Answer target: async/await and next(err) and minimal_change.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("heapUsed")
C: min_diff ∧ preserve(next(err)) ∧ callback_shape
P: audit("setInterval") ∧ null_refs(batch_rows) ∧ extract(tick_fn) ∧ clear_closure_capture
V: heap_steady(empty_queue) ∧ heap_steady(post_drain) ∧ no_regression(billing_flow)
A: root_cause("retained closures in setInterval hold batch_rows") ∧ min_fix(null_batch_after_tick ∧ hoist_tick_fn) ∧ reg_test(heapUsed_flat_over_N_ticks)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("heapUsed").
Constraints: minimal diff and preserve(next(err)) and callback_shape.
Plan: audit("setInterval") and null_refs(batch_rows) and extract(tick_fn) and clear_closure_capture.
Verify: heap_steady(empty_queue) and heap_steady(post_drain) and no regression(billing_flow).
Answer target: root_cause("retained closures in setInterval hold batch_rows") and minimal fix(null_batch_after_tick and hoist_tick_fn) and regression test(heapUsed_flat_over_N_ticks).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: design(audit_log_schema)
C: store("PostgreSQL") ∧ retain("7 years") ∧ partition(monthly) ∧ lean_ops
P: schema(id ts actor action target payload("JSONB")) → partition(range ts monthly) → index(ts actor) → export(compliance)
V: test(monthly_boundary) ∧ test(export_query) ∧ test(retention_drop)
A: schema_sketch ∧ partitioning_strategy ∧ short_why

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(rate_limiter_key)
C: trust_boundary ∧ no_spoof("X-Forwarded-For")
P: derive(key,session∨req.ip) ∧ strip_client_header ∧ validate_gateway_provenance ∧ atomic_incr("Redis")
V: test(spoofed_xff) ∧ test(missing_header) ∧ test(shared_ip) ∧ test(per_session_scope)
A: bind_key(trusted_source) ∧ drop("X-Forwarded-For",untrusted) ∧ document(gateway_contract)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(rate_limiter_key).
Constraints: trust_boundary and no_spoof("X-Forwarded-For").
Plan: derive(key, session or req.ip) and strip_client_header and validate_gateway_provenance and atomic_incr("Redis").
Verify: test(spoofed_xff) and test(missing_header) and test(shared_ip) and test(per_session_scope).
Answer target: bind_key(trusted_source) and drop("X-Forwarded-For", untrusted) and document(gateway_contract).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: extract(currency_helper)
C: pkg("@atlas/currency") ∧ preserve_call_sites ∧ semver
P: audit_duplicates → unify_api → publish("package.json") → replace_imports
V: unit(parity) ∧ integration(billing ∧ audit ∧ gateway) ∧ snapshot(format)
A: plan(extract) ∧ version("semver" 0.1.0 → 1.0.0) ∧ tests(parity ∧ locale_edge ∧ rounding)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: idempotent(webhook_receiver)
C: retries_5xx ∧ observable_replays ∧ PostgreSQL
P: require("Idempotency-Key") → upsert(dedup_table pk=key) → on_conflict(return_stored_response) → process_once_in_tx
V: test(first_200) ∧ test(replay_returns_stored) ∧ test(missing_key_returns_"409") ∧ test(concurrent_same_key_single_process)
A: dedup=unique_key_table error=reject_missing_key_with_"409" why=single_write_point_enables_safe_replays

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("N+1")
C: preserve_shape ∧ min_diff
P: batch_ids → find_in("customerId") → map_by_id → hydrate_rows
V: unit(batch_hydration) ∧ perf_gate(3x_regress)
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("N+1").
Constraints: preserve_shape and minimal diff.
Plan: batch_ids then find_in("customerId") then map_by_id then hydrate_rows.
Verify: unit(batch_hydration) and perf_gate(3x_regress).
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test.
